adaptive_fields_enabled.description: When true, new inbound keys are auto-cataloged as CustomFields

adaptive_fields_ignore_list.description: JSON array of field names (case-insensitive) that must never be cataloged or forwarded

require_trustedform_cert.description: When true, leads without a valid TrustedForm cert URL are queued before reaching LeadByte

fb_api_version.description: Facebook Graph API version used for CAPI calls

fb_api_version_auto.description: When true, the Facebook Graph API version is auto-selected from the latest available
